    <a-card hoverable>
        <template #cover>
            <div class="thumbnail" style="background: url(https://gw.alipayobjects.com/zos/rmsportal/JiqGstEfoWAOHiTxclqi.png);" />
        </template>
        <a-card-meta title="Card title" description="This is the description">

        </a-card-meta>
    </a-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import VueLazyload from 'vue-lazyload';
import { useFetch } from '~/composables/api';

definePageMeta({
    ssr: true, // 指定该页面支持服务端渲染
});

useHead({
    titleTemplate: (titleChunk: string | undefined): string => {
        return titleChunk ? `${titleChunk} - 忘れてやらない` : '鼠子Blog';
    },
    meta: [
        { name: 'keywords', content: '鼠子,Tomori,ShuShuicu' },
        { name: 'description', content: '鼠子(Tomoriゞ)记录日常的小站' }
    ],
});
</script>

<!-- index.vue -->
<template>
  <a-card hoverable v-for="post in posts" :key="post.cid">
    <template #cover>
      <div class="thumbnail" :style="{ background: `url(${post.thumbnailUrl})` }" />
    </template>
    <a-card-meta :title="post.title" :description="post.digest" />
  </a-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted, ref } from 'vue';
import { fetchPosts } from '~/composables/api';

const posts = ref([]);

onMounted(async () => {
  try {
    const data = await fetchPosts(5, 1);
    if (data.status === 'success') {
      posts.value = data.data.dataSet;
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to fetch posts:', error);
  }
});

definePageMeta({
  ssr: true, // 指定该页面支持服务端渲染
});

useHead({
  titleTemplate: (titleChunk: string | undefined): string => {
    return titleChunk ? `${titleChunk} - 忘れてやらない` : '鼠子Blog';
  },
  meta: [
    { name: 'keywords', content: '鼠子,Tomori,ShuShuicu' },
    { name: 'description', content: '鼠子(Tomoriゞ)记录日常的小站' }
  ],
});
</script>

        </template>
        <a-card-meta title="Card title" description="This is the description" />
    </a-card>
</template>

});

content.after:
<template>
  <a-card hoverable v-for="post in posts" :key="post.cid">
    <template #cover>
      <div class="thumbnail" :style="{ background: `url(${post.thumbnail})` }" />
    </template>
    <a-card-meta :title="post.title" :description="post.digest" />
  </a-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useApi } from '~/composables/api'

const { getPosts } = useApi()

const posts = ref([])

onMounted(async () => {
  try {
    const response = await getPosts(5, 1)
    if (response.status === 'success') {
      posts.value = response.data.dataSet
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching posts:', error)
  }
})

definePageMeta({
  ssr: true, // 指定该页面支持服务端渲染
})

useHead({
  titleTemplate: (titleChunk: string | undefined): string => {
    return titleChunk ? `${titleChunk} - 忘れてやらない` : '鼠子Blog'
  },
  meta: [
    { name: 'keywords', content: '鼠子,Tomori,ShuShuicu' },
    { name: 'description', content: '鼠子(Tomoriゞ)记录日常的小站' }
  ],
})
</script>

        <template #cover>
            <div class="thumbnail" style="background: url(https://gw.alipayobjects.com/zos/rmsportal/JiqGstEfoWAOHiTxclqi.png);" />

        <a-card-meta title="Card title" description="This is the description" />
    </a-card>
</template>

content.after:
<template>
  <a-card hoverable v-for="post in posts" :key="post.cid">
    <template #cover>
      <div class="thumbnail" :style="{ background: `url(${post.thumbnail})` }" />
    </template>
    <a-card-meta :title="post.title" :description="post.digest" />
  </a-card>
</template>

<script setup>
import { useApi } from '~/composables/api'
import { useAsyncData } from '#app'

const { getPosts } = useApi()

const { data: posts } = await useAsyncData('posts', async () => {
  try {
    const response = await getPosts(5, 1)
    if (response.status === 'success') {
      return response.data.dataSet
    }
    throw new Error('Failed to fetch posts')
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching posts:', error)
    return []
  }
})

definePageMeta({
  ssr: true, // 指定该页面支持服务端渲染
})

useHead({
  titleTemplate: (titleChunk) => {
    return titleChunk ? `${titleChunk} - 忘れてやらない` : '鼠子Blog'
  },
  meta: [
    { name: 'keywords', content: '鼠子,Tomori,ShuShuicu' },
    { name: 'description', content: '鼠子(Tomoriゞ)记录日常的小站' }
  ],
})
</script>

<template>
    <a-card hoverable v-for="post in posts" :key="post.cid">
        <template #cover>
            <div class="thumbnail" :style="{ background: `url(${post.thumbnail})` }" />
        </template>
        <a-card-meta :title="post.title" :description="post.digest" />
    </a-card>
</template>

<script setup>
import { useApi } from '~/composables/api'
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'

const { getPosts } = useApi()

const posts = ref([])

onMounted(async () => {
    try {
        const response = await getPosts(5, 1)
        if (response.status === 'success') {
            posts.value = response.data.dataSet
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error fetching posts:', error)
    }
})

definePageMeta({
    ssr: true, // 指定该页面支持服务端渲染
})

useHead({
    titleTemplate: (titleChunk) => {
        return titleChunk ? `${titleChunk} - 忘れてやらない` : '鼠子Blog'
    },
    meta: [
        { name: 'keywords', content: '鼠子,Tomori,ShuShuicu' },
        { name: 'description', content: '鼠子(Tomoriゞ)记录日常的小站' }
    ],
})
</script>
